com.shanebeestudios.vf.api - package com.shanebeestudios.vf.api
Root package of the VirtualFurnaceAPI, contains generalized API classes
com.shanebeestudios.vf.api.builder - package com.shanebeestudios.vf.api.builder
Builders to easily create customized ItemStacks
com.shanebeestudios.vf.api.chunk - package com.shanebeestudios.vf.api.chunk
Classes relevant to VirtualChunks
com.shanebeestudios.vf.api.event.machine - package com.shanebeestudios.vf.api.event.machine
Events related to Machines
com.shanebeestudios.vf.api.machine - package com.shanebeestudios.vf.api.machine
Classes relevant to Machines
com.shanebeestudios.vf.api.property - package com.shanebeestudios.vf.api.property
Classes relevant to Machine Properties
com.shanebeestudios.vf.api.recipe - package com.shanebeestudios.vf.api.recipe
Classes relevant to Recipes
com.shanebeestudios.vf.api.task - package com.shanebeestudios.vf.api.task
Tasks for ticking Machines

Classes relevant to Tiles
